calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Claire Sullivan appearing via zoom for John Sullivan and Laura Sullivan Van Zandt (Petitioners).
Molly White appearing via zoom for Merrill Lynch (objector).

Discussion held regarding the transfer of assets to be distributed to the trust, that the settlor executed a pour-over-will, and that to include language so Merrill Lynch isn't responsible for any transfer tax. Petition for order confirming trust assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Svahlin. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
